name: paigy
description: Call, notify, and receive replies through Paigy from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Voice inbox and callbacks for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Paigy adds its MCP server and a safe workflow for notifications, calls, replies, and callbacks in Codex.
defaultPrompt: Pair Paigy with this Codex session.
Send a Paigy notification when I need a decision.
Check and handle my Paigy replies.
